title: LIMIT / OFFSET support still broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_users (user_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id > 2 ORDER BY user_id LIMIT 2;
SELECT user_id, user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0;
key_bug_features: LIMIT and OFFSET not functioning correctly in queries
